metcon.name: Metcon
metcon.description:
Part B
3 RFT
3 rope climbs
30 Russian KB Swings
30 cal row ea

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes posterior chain and grip. Address antagonists and weak points without competing for recovery.

raw_text:
Metcon | Score Rounds and Reps
Part A
25 min AMRAP
300m run
20 KB snatches
10m HSW or 2 wall walks
20 T2B
30 box jumps
Metcon | Part B
3 RFT
3 rope climbs
30 Russian KB Swings
30 cal row ea
siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: Rounds for Time: Part B, 3 rope climbs, 30 Russian KB Swings, 30 cal row ea. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, triceps, core.
